generated_response: We offer full refunds within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days back to your original payment method.

query: How do I reset my password?
generated_response: To reset your password, click Forgot Password on the login page. You will receive a reset link by email within 2 minutes.

query: Can you explain all the features included in the Pro plan, the Enterprise plan, and how they differ from the free tier?
generated_response: The Free tier includes up to 3 projects and 1GB storage. The Pro plan adds unlimited projects, 50GB storage, priority support, and API access at $49/month. The Enterprise plan includes everything in Pro plus SSO, dedicated support, custom contracts, and unlimited storage.
You can reach our support team via email at support@acmecorp.com or through the live chat on our website, available Monday to Friday 9am to 6pm EST.
